channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: The Latest: Hurricane Milton weakens to Category 1, but danger remains in Florida
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday along Florida’s Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm, bringing powerful winds, deadly storm surge and potential flooding to much of the state. Milton drew fuel from exceedingly warm Gulf of Mexico waters, twice reaching Category 5 status.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton spawns destructive, deadly tornadoes before making landfall
item.description: Multiple powerful tornadoes ripped across Florida hours before Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday, tearing off roofs, overturning vehicles and sucking debris into the air as the black V-shaped columns moved through. Deaths were reported in St.
item.dc:creator: SUMAN NAISHADHAM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Acting or hosting, Travis Kelce wants to continue to pursue a showbiz career. But first, football
item.description: Travis Kelce plays a flirty nurse with swagger on FX's series “Grotesquerie," landed a cameo in "Happy Gilmore 2”, and hosts a new game show. If Hollywood's calling, he'll take the meeting — with one caveat. Football comes first.
item.dc:creator: ALICIA RANCILIO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: China seeks deeper economic ties with ASEAN at summit talks as South China Sea disputes lurk
item.description: VIENTIANE, Laos (AP) — Chinese Premier Li Qiang called for deeper market integration with Southeast Asia on Thursday during annual summit talks where territorial disputes in the South China Sea are likely to be high on the agenda.
item.dc:creator: EILEEN NG AND JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: More than 2.6 million without power as Hurricane Milton slams Florida, causes deaths and flooding
item.description: Hurricane Milton has plowed into Florida as a Category 3 storm, bringing misery to a coast still ravaged by Helene, pounding cities with winds of over 100 mph after producing a barrage of tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: Terry Spencer And Kate Payne, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Finding gas in Florida after Milton will be a challenge, analyst says
item.description: 63% of gas stations in the Tampa area are out of gas, and it could be weeks before they're resupplied.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Turkey's navy starts to evacuate its citizens from Beirut as Israel battles Hezbollah
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Over 2,000 Turkish citizens and some foreign nationals started boarding a Turkish military ship late Wednesday that brought in aid and will take them out of a country being hit by Israeli airstrikes targeting Hezbollah.
item.dc:creator: MEHMET GUZEL and ROBERT BADENDIECK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Video: Wind tears roof off Tropicana Field, home of the Rays
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Siesta Key south of St. Petersburg, and while the city avoided some of the worst storm surges that doesn't mean the city avoided major effects from the storm.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KRON4

item.title: Post-Milton gas in Florida will be a challenge: GasBuddy founder
item.description: 63% of gas stations in the Tampa area are out of gas, and it could be weeks before they're resupplied.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs to make first appearance before trial judge in sex trafficking case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean “Diddy” Combs is set to make his first appearance before the judge who is expected to preside over the hip-hop powerbroker's trial on sex trafficking charges.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Takeaways from an AP investigation of Russia recruiting Africans to make drones for use in Ukraine
item.description: About 200 women ages 18-22 from across Africa have been recruited to work in a factory alongside Russian vocational students assembling thousands of Iranian-designed attack drones to be launched into Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: EMMA BURROWS and LORI HINNANT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Watch: Massive 28-foot wave captured inside Hurricane Milton
item.description: Drone footage captured a monstrous wave inside Hurricane Milton as the powerful storm passed through the Gulf of Mexico on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Milton slams Florida as a Category 3 storm; leaving millions in the dark
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday along Florida’s Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm, bringing powerful winds, deadly storm surge and potential flooding to much of the state. Milton drew fuel from exceedingly warm Gulf of Mexico waters, twice reaching Category 5 status.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton makes landfall, slamming into Florida with destructive winds, catastrophic storm surge
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday night, with experts predicting it could be the worst storm in the area in decades. Millions of people had their power knocked out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California sea lion dies after being shot; police hunt for gunman
item.description: A California sea lion was shot and killed by a gunman in Orange County Monday, according to the NOAA. The male was around 2 years old and was shot in the back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brown rejects calls to divest from companies in connection with pro-Palestinian protests on campus
item.description: Brown University has rejected a proposal to divest from 10 companies that protesters say were facilitating the Israeli occupation of Palestinian territory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Polluted waste from Florida's fertilizer industry is in the path of Milton's fury
item.description: As Hurricane Milton pummels Florida’s west coast with powerful winds and flooding rain, environmentalists are worried it could scatter the polluted leftovers of the state’s phosphate fertilizer mining industry and other hazardous waste across the peninsula and into vulnerable waterways.
item.dc:creator: Michael Biesecker And Jason Dearen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jenna Fischer of 'The Office' reveals breast cancer diagnosis, recovery
item.description: "I never thought I’d be making an announcement like this but here we are," Fischer wrote in an emotional Instagram post.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Tampa's 'Lt. Dan' says he's riding out Hurricane Milton on boat despite mayor's warning
item.description: A Tampa man who goes by the nickname "Lt. Dan" has caused a flurry of online concern for his safety during Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: In remote mountain communities cut off by Helene, residents look to the skies for aid
item.description: RAMSEYTOWN, N.C. (AP) — As the Black Hawk helicopter slowly descends in Ramseytown, North Carolina, a plume of sand kicks up. When the dust settles, the sprawling sea of stones and twisted metal beams becomes clear.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kremlin confirms Trump sent COVID tests to Putin during pandemic
item.description: “We also sent equipment at the beginning of the pandemic,” Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said. “But about the phone calls — it’s not true.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: NASA video shows Hurricane Milton from space
item.description: Video taken from the International Space Station puts the massive size of Hurricane Milton into perspective.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: Disneyland increases prices on most theme park tickets, Magic Keys
item.description: Most park tickets increased 6% in price while annual passes, known as Magic Keys, increased anywhere between 6% to 20%.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, NewsNation

item.title: Jenna Fischer of 'The Office' reveals breast cancer diagnosis, recovery
item.description: Jenna Fischer, the actress well-known for her role as Pam on "The Office," revealed her diagnosis and recovery in a post to social media.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, KRON4

item.title: North Carolina lawmakers pass $273M Helene relief bill with voting changes to more counties
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina legislators completed an initial $273 million relief package on Wednesday to help spur recovery from Hurricane Helene, describing it as a down payment on aid and a way to help hard-hit counties gain more flexibility in holding elections already underway.
item.dc:creator: GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tropical dictionary: Words to know as active hurricane season continues
item.description: Let’s dive into some of the frequently used words and phrases that are on repeat during this busy week of hurricane season.
item.dc:creator: Alex Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Head of international shipping regulator says industry must do more to cut carbon pollution
item.description: HAMBURG, Germany (AP) — For years, the international shipping industry has been criticized for making little progress in reducing the carbon-belching pollution released from the fuels that vessels use in moving most of the cargo that people use every day, such as food, cars and clothing.
item.dc:creator: PETER PRENGAMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Can Waffle House really help predict a storm's severity?
item.description: When hurricanes tear through Southeastern towns, the hot meals and bold yellow signs of the local Waffle House provide another kind of comfort.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kremlin confirms Trump sent COVID tests to Putin during pandemic
item.description: The Kremlin confirmed that former President Trump while in office sent Russian President Vladimir Putin COVID-19 testing devices during the height of the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, KRON4

item.title: Plane makes emergency landing in New York City after pilot dies mid-flight
item.description: Crew members on the Turkish Airlines flight worked to revive the pilot, but he died before the plane landed.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Hurricane Milton: Protect your home from looting with these 4 steps
item.description: Emergency preparedness expert Geoff Fahringer explains how to make your home unattractive to would-be looters as Hurricane Milton approaches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: This Montana Senate candidate said his opponent ate 'lobbyist steak.' But he lobbied—with steak
item.description: BILLINGS, Mont. (AP) — During an October debate, Montana GOP Senate candidate Tim Sheehy denounced his Democratic opponent, Sen. Jon Tester, for ” eating lobbyist steak ″ while the Republican fought in Afghanistan.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Muggers ripped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's arm, police say
item.description:
Police in California say thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month and ripped a pricey watch off his arm.
Police say the victims were all targets of organized groups who steal high-end watches in large crowds during events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: States sue TikTok, alleging platform is addictive, harms kids' mental health
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia sued TikTok on Tuesday, alleging the platform exploits and harms young users while "deceiving" the public about these dangers.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, Fox 5

item.title: Canyoneer dies after accidental 150-foot fall at Zion National Park
item.description: A man fell while canyoneering at Zion National Park on Saturday, resulting in his death, according to the National Park Service.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, WGN 9

item.title: Fearful residents flee Tampa Bay region as Hurricane Milton takes aim at Florida coast
item.description: Fearful Florida residents streamed out of the Tampa Bay region Tuesday ahead of what could be a once-in-a-century direct hit from Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nibi the 'diva' beaver won't be released, Massachusetts governor decides
item.description: The question of whether a 2-year-old beaver named Nibi can stay with the rescuers she has known since she was a baby or must be released into the wild has been resolved, thanks to the governor of Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
